description: Designed for those who never compromise on style and comfort, this pair of leather shoes from ganuchi is a great addition to your wardrobe. UpperWide midfoot strap with a padded fabric inner lining for absolute all-day comfort and styleExtra padding at the upper midfoot rim of the strap for enhanced comfortLeather footbed for style and all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with multi-directional lugs and grooves for enhanced grip and traction on various surfacesslipper careUse a branded leather conditionerDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
